reference: Hi, you have not specified what kind of injury she had. There can be direct causes, like an injury to the shoulder and elbow, or indirect causes, like prolonged bed rest, head injury, etc. In the case of direct injury, reassessment is required for bones and soft tissues with X-rays and Magnetic Resonance Imaging. For indirect causes like a head injury, knowing the exact nature of the injury will be helpful in planning treatment.
text: Hi, you have not specified what kind of injury she had. There can be direct causes like an injury to the shoulder and elbow, or indirect causes like prolonged bed rest, head injury, etc. In the case of direct injury, reassessment is required for bones and soft tissues with x-rays and magnetic resonance imaging. For indirect causes like a head injury, knowing the exact nature of the injury will be helpful in planning treatment.
